query: DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS insert_impact_analysis(text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text,text); CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION insert_impact_analysis(p_initiative_id text, p_source text, p_program text, p_portfolio text, p_title text, p_owner text, p_nature text, p_sector text, p_impacted_bu text, p_impact_justification text, p_culture text, p_skills text, p_skills_desc text, p_org_design text, p_org_design_desc text, p_technology text, p_technology_desc text, p_processes text, p_processes_desc text, p_overall_impact text, p_risk text, p_risk_mitigation text) RETURNS void LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER AS $X$ BEGIN INSERT INTO "TMC"."Change - Impact Analysis" ("InitiativeID#","Source","program","Portfolio","title","owner","Nature_on_Impact","Sector","Impacted_BU","Impact_Justification","Culture","Skills","Skills_Description","Org_Design","Org_Design_Description","Technology","Technology_Description","Processes","Processes_Description","OverAll_Impact","risk","Risk_mitigetion") VALUES (p_initiative_id,p_source,p_program,p_portfolio,p_title,p_owner,p_nature,p_sector,p_impacted_bu,p_impact_justification,p_culture,p_skills,p_skills_desc,p_org_design,p_org_design_desc,p_technology,p_technology_desc,p_processes,p_processes_desc,p_overall_impact::double precision,p_risk,p_risk_mitigation); END; $X$;
